item.title: StarTalk: The Hubble Tension Explained
item.description: StarTalk explores the Hubble tension, where local and distant measurements of the universe do not match.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk: The Hubble Tension Explained
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores the Hubble tension, where local and distant measurements of the universe do not match.

item.title: Neil and Charles Share Childhood Advice
item.description: StarTalk features Neil and Charles as they exchange advice they received while growing up.

media:content.media:title: Neil and Charles Share Childhood Advice
media:content.media:description: StarTalk features Neil and Charles as they exchange advice they received while growing up.

item.title: StarTalk: Why Light Beams Fade
item.description: StarTalk explains why light beams don’t go on forever, exploring the science behind how light travels.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk: Why Light Beams Fade
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explains why light beams don’t go on forever, exploring the science behind how light travels.

item.title: How Cepheid stars help measure space
item.description: StarTalk explains why Cepheid stars are rare and how they help astronomers measure cosmic distances.

media:content.media:title: How Cepheid stars help measure space
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explains why Cepheid stars are rare and how they help astronomers measure cosmic distances.

item.title: StarTalk: Exploring Earth's Atmosphere
item.description: Neil deGrasse Tyson explains the layers of our atmosphere in this StarTalk video.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk: Exploring Earth's Atmosphere
media:content.media:description: Neil deGrasse Tyson explains the layers of our atmosphere in this StarTalk video.

item.title: StarTalk on the science of rainbows
item.description: StarTalk explores rainbow science and shares a few surprising facts about how they appear.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk on the science of rainbows
media:content.media:description: StarTalk explores rainbow science and shares a few surprising facts about how they appear.

item.title: StarTalk on NASA Budget Cuts
item.description: An overview of recent discussions around funding adjustments for NASA, including policy decisions, priorities, and their potential impact on space programs.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk on NASA Budget Cuts
media:content.media:description: An overview of recent discussions around funding adjustments for NASA, including policy decisions, priorities, and their potential impact on space programs.

item.title: StarTalk: Is global warming delaying an Ice Age?
item.description: An explanation of how human-driven climate change may affect long-term climate cycles, including what scientists understand about past Ice Ages and future projections.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk: Is global warming delaying an Ice Age?
media:content.media:description: An explanation of how human-driven climate change may affect long-term climate cycles, including what scientists understand about past Ice Ages and future projections.

item.title: StarTalk on Food Dyes, Salt, and Raw Milk
item.description: A balanced look at common food topics like artificial dyes, salt intake, and raw milk, focusing on what current science says about their safety and health effects.

media:content.media:title: StarTalk on Food Dyes, Salt, and Raw Milk
media:content.media:description: A balanced look at common food topics like artificial dyes, salt intake, and raw milk, focusing on what current science says about their safety and health effects.
